landing.heroSubtitle: One line of topic is enough. We auto-generate drawing-reveal explainer videos in your chosen art style within minutes.
landing.stylesSubtitle: Same content, different mood. It becomes your channel identity.
landing.howSubtitle: From topic to finished video — shown with real screens.
landing.step1Desc: Write a topic or upload material, and AI drafts the script and scenes.
landing.step2Desc: Review and edit the narration. It's before image generation, so it's free.
landing.step3Desc: Images, motion, and voice are auto-composed into a drawing-reveal mp4.
landing.gallerySubtitle: Same content, different mood. Tap a card to preview the image and video.
landing.voicesSubtitle: Narration voices for your scenes. Tap ▶ to preview.
landing.featuresSubtitle: From script to voice, direction and render — one flow.
landing.feat1Desc: Drawings appear exactly as they're spoken. No manual timing.
landing.feat2Desc: From ink wash to flat icons. Pick one that fits your channel.
landing.feat3Desc: Fix only the scenes you don't like. No need to rebuild the whole video.
landing.feat4Desc: Reflects your logo and company name across scenes for brand videos.
landing.useSubtitle: From knowledge channels to store promos.
landing.use1Desc: Explainer content posted regularly as shorts or long-form.
landing.use2Desc: Brand intro videos with your logo and name.
landing.use3Desc: Course material, onboarding, internal training videos.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Get started now. No credit card required.

create.title: Create New Video
create.topicPlaceholder: Enter a topic for your video (e.g. The Law of Diminishing Marginal Utility)
create.uploadPlaceholder: Drag & drop or click to upload PDF, DOCX, TXT, MD
